product_details_tab_data.Specific Uses: Spritz 12-17 centimetres away from skin, or spritz into the air and walk into fragrance or dab onto pulse points.
product_details_tab_data.Product Benefit: Sun-kissed orange flower and bergamot with a base of vanilla and cedarwood—pure summer joy in a bottle.
